title: Docusign status won’t update
excerpt:
When I send a document and customers complete it, it updates the status just fine, and in my work flow I have the item moved to a new group. 
If I send that same customer a 2nd docusign, the status column won’t re-update…

posts.author: john2286 (John )
posts.cookedHtml:
When I send a document and customers complete it, it updates the status just fine, and in my work flow I have the item moved to a new group.

If I send that same customer a 2nd docusign, the status column won’t re-update even though it’s the same email. Very frustrating because I can’t build a works flow using multiple documents. Help please
